name: HWR_CAT_TOPIC_VL
query: SELECT B.TOPIC_ID, B.TOPIC_KEY, B.CATEGORY_ID, B.CATEGORY_KEY, B.IS_SEEDED_DATA, B.ACCURACY_VALUE, B.IMPORTANCE_VALUE, B.PRECISION_VALUE, B.RELEVANCE_VALUE, B.IS_ACTIVE, B.AVERAGE_SCORE, B.URL_LINK, T.DISPLAY_TEXT, T.DESCRIPTION, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM HWR_CAT_TOPIC_B B, HWR_CAT_TOPIC_TL T WHERE B.TOPIC_ID = T.TOPIC_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
